name: Dragonfire Halfbow
description:
Crafted by layering bamboo with strips of sliced scales harvested from a fire-breathing dragon, this bow has a significant draw strength. This design is commonly seen in Hongal, as the shorter limbs allow for easier maneuvering on horseback. While the wielder of this +2 striking composite shortbow is mounted, they apply the bow's item bonus to Nature checks to Command your mount.

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You draw the bow back to its maximum draw length without nocking an arrow, and as you release the string, the dragonfire halfbow casts (heightened to 5th-rank; save), targeted at a point of your choosing within the spell's range. You and your mount are immune to the effects of this fireball.
